# vrksh

> Unix tools for AI pipelines. One static Go binary.

## Tools

Input:
- vrk grab - URL fetcher - clean markdown, plain text, or raw HTML.
- vrk links - Hyperlink extractor - markdown, HTML, bare URLs to JSONL.

Transform:
- vrk tok - Token counter - cl100k_base, --budget guard, --json.
- vrk chunk - Token-aware text splitter - JSONL chunks within a token budget.
- vrk plain - Markdown stripper - removes syntax, keeps prose.
- vrk recase - Naming convention converter - snake, camel, kebab, pascal, title.
- vrk slug - URL/filename slug generator - --separator, --max, --json.
- vrk pct - Percent encoder/decoder - RFC 3986, --encode, --decode, --form.
- vrk base - Encoding converter - base64, base64url, hex, base32.
- vrk jsonl - JSON array to JSONL converter - --collect, --json.

Guard:
- vrk assert - Pipeline condition check - jq conditions, --contains, --matches.
- vrk validate - JSONL schema validator - --schema, --strict, --fix, --json.
- vrk mask - Secret redactor - entropy + pattern-based, streaming.

Execute:
- vrk prompt - LLM prompt - Anthropic/OpenAI, --schema, --retry, --explain.
- vrk coax - Retry wrapper - --times, --backoff, --on, --until.

Store:
- vrk kv - Key-value store - SQLite-backed, namespaces, TTL, atomic counters.
- vrk emit - Structured logger - wraps stdin lines as JSONL log records.

Utility:
- vrk jwt - JWT inspector - decode, --claim, --expired, --valid.
- vrk epoch - Timestamp converter - unix to ISO, relative time, --tz.
- vrk uuid - UUID generator - v4/v7, --count, --json.
- vrk moniker - Memorable name generator - run IDs, job labels, temp dirs.
- vrk digest - Universal hasher - sha256/md5/sha512, --hmac, --compare.
- vrk sse - SSE stream parser - text/event-stream to JSONL.
- vrk sip - Stream sampler - --first, --count, --every, --sample.
- vrk throttle - Rate limiter for pipes - --rate N/s or N/m.
- vrk urlinfo - URL parser - scheme, host, port, path, query, --field.

## Per-tool skill files

- /skills/grab.md | /skills/links.md
- /skills/tok.md | /skills/chunk.md | /skills/plain.md | /skills/recase.md | /skills/slug.md | /skills/pct.md | /skills/base.md | /skills/jsonl.md
- /skills/assert.md | /skills/validate.md | /skills/mask.md
- /skills/prompt.md | /skills/coax.md
- /skills/kv.md | /skills/emit.md
- /skills/jwt.md | /skills/epoch.md | /skills/uuid.md | /skills/moniker.md | /skills/digest.md | /skills/sse.md | /skills/sip.md | /skills/throttle.md | /skills/urlinfo.md

## Full reference

For complete flag documentation, exit codes, and compose patterns:
https://vrk.sh/skills.md

All machine-readable endpoints:
https://vrk.sh/agents/
